compiled_state.title: Wire Figma integration test runner into tests/run-all.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Add tests/integration/run-integration-tests.sh as a sixth suite in tests/run-all.sh so the Figma pull-back RED integration tests are executed by validate.sh --ci and the pre-commit test gate.

## Why
The RED integration tests in test-figma-pullback-integration.sh are invisible to all CI enforcement if not wired into run-all.sh. The test gate and validate.sh --ci both use commands.test_unit=bash tests/run-all.sh, which currently calls 5 suites only.

## testing_mode: UPDATE
Existing behavior of run-all.sh changes: now also runs integration tests.

## Files to Modify
- tests/run-all.sh — add integration test suite call

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/run-all.sh contains a call to tests/integration/run-integration-tests.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'run-integration-tests.sh' tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0 when all non-integration tests pass (integration failures are reported but run-all.sh exit behavior is unchanged for other suites)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | grep -E 'PASSED:|Integration tests:'
- [ ] bash -n tests/run-all.sh exits 0 (syntax valid)
  Verify: bash -n tests/run-all.sh
